rationale: The citing paper is a theoretical game-theoretic model of strategic polarization in group decision expression (speaking order, misreporting incentives, welfare) with no empirical dataset, whereas the cited paper is an empirical differences-in-differences study of how online book reviews affect sales at Amazon vs. bn.com. Given this clear construct/method mismatch and only a single bare DOI match with no in-text citation context provided, the citation most likely serves as domain background (e.g., online reviews) rather than a substantive theory/method dependency.
